query:
SELECT
      pool,
      pool_address,
      protocol,
      round(tvl_usd, 2)   AS tvl_usd,
      round(volume_7d, 2) AS volume_7d,
      trades_7d,
      traders_7d
    FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_pools_latest
    WHERE 1 = 1
      /*__FILTER_CONDITIONS__*/
    ORDER BY tvl_usd DESC NULLS LAST
